findings.evidence: `PointsFunctor.lean:44-82` defines this API before any categorical construction, while the needed underlying API is already in `FunctorOfPoints.lean:155-180` as `AlgHom.mapValue`, `mapValue_id`, and `mapValue_comp`; the category imports are only at `PointsFunctor.lean:6-7`.
findings.fix: Move the `AlgPoints` abbrev and `namespace AlgPoints` block to `TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean` near `AlgHom.mapValue`; keep only `pointsFunctor` and its categorical simp lemmas in `PointsFunctor.lean`.
findings.issue: `AlgPoints`, `AlgPoints.hom`, `AlgPoints.map`, and their basic map lemmas are just aliases/wrappers for the convolution API and do not use `CommAlgCat` or `GrpCat`, but they live in the categorical wrapper file.

summary: The categorical functor is in the right directory, but the raw `AlgPoints` API is placed too late and forces category imports on non-categorical users.
